typecheck.command: npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/client/tsconfig.json

blockingIssues.description: Tab progression is not implemented: Tab is prevented in InlineEditableField but parent onTab handlers are no-ops, so focus does not move to the next editable field.
OrgChart employee cards do not support inline editing for level; level is rendered as static text/badge.
Undo/redo per-scenario isolation can break when async mutations resolve after scenario switches; commands are pushed against active scenario at push time, potentially mixing stacks.
Bulk Change Manager records individual move commands, so a single undo does not revert the full bulk operation as one unit.
Bulk manager update can assign self/cyclic manager relationships (selected employees not excluded; move endpoint lacks cycle validation), violating hierarchy invariants.
Cmd+K handler runs before input-focus guards, so it can fire while typing in input/form fields.
Escape handling returns early in selectedEmployee states and can skip full close/deselect behavior (clear selection and close panel), violating expected semantics.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen the implementation-worker skill to require explicit transcript evidence for test-first work before allowing `followedProcedure: true`, or require workers to mark deviations when TDD is not followed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `undo-redo-system` reported implementation committed before tests were authored in transcript skeleton while handoff still reported `followedProcedure: true`.
